items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Multi-visit coordination' requirement, but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions multi-visit coordination as a need, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this coordination has been effectively implemented or validated. This lack of direct evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's coverage.
